title: YTP: Billy Mays Declares That No One Is Worthy Enough For The Ultimate Crotch Protection
description:
Yeah, this one started off as good, until I ran out of ideas =\ ah well, better off uploading a half-assed video over no video at all, right?  Well maybe you guys will like it, but I dont think it'll ever live up to the last two vids.

Enjoy it anyway, hopefully I'll think of something better for the next one xD

Don't fuck with Billy Mays.
